entry.ptxt: Driver front seat belt assembly (with ELR and pretensioner)
Passenger-side rear side seat belt assembly (with ELR)
Buckle for rear side seat belt
Passenger front seat belt assembly (with ELR and pretensioner)
Rear center seat belt assembly (with ELR)
Buckle for rear center seat belt
Passenger seat belt reminder light (included in hazard warning switch)
Driver-side rear side seat belt assembly (with ELR)

servinfosub.title: Seat Belt Assembly with ELR
servinfosub.ptxt: Seat belt assembly with emergency locking retractor (ELR) is designed so that it locks immediately (to prevent the webbing from being pulled out of the retractor any further) when any of the following items is detected as exceeding each set value:

item.ptxt: Speed at which the webbing is pulled out of the retractor.
Acceleration or deceleration of vehicle speed.

servinfosub.title: Seat Belt Assembly with ELR and Pretensioner
servinfosub.ptxt: The seat belt assembly with ELR and a pretensioner has a pretensioner mechanism which operates in linkage with the air bag in addition to the described ELR.

The pretensioner is incorporated in retractor and controlled by SDM as one of air bag system components. It will be activated at the same time as the driver and passenger air bag (inflator) module when an impact at the front of vehicle exceeds the specified value.
When servicing front seat belt assembly, be sure to observe all WARNINGs and CAUTIONs and Precautions for Air Bag System Service .

servinfosub.title: Seat Belt Reminder
servinfosub.ptxt: If driver or passenger seat belt is unfastened (under the following conditions), seat belt reminder light and warning buzzer inform that driver or passenger seat belt is unfastened. Driver seat belt reminder light is located in combination meter. Passenger seat belt reminder light is located between the center ventilation louvers. Warning buzzer is located inside combination meter.
These reminder lights and warning buzzer operate as follows:

item.ptxt: Seat belt reminder light comes on if driver or passenger seat belt is unfastened when ignition is “ON”.

If vehicle speed exceeds 15 km/h (9 mile/h) with seat belt unfastened, warning buzzer operates for approximately 95 seconds and corresponding seat belt reminder light flashes synchronously with buzzer. When warning buzzer stops operating, the corresponding seat belt reminder light stays ON.

If driver or passenger seat belt is unfastened while vehicle speed is above 15 km/h (9 mile/h), warning buzzer operates for approximately 95 seconds and corresponding seat belt reminder light flashes synchronously with buzzer. When warning buzzer stops operating, the corresponding seat belt reminder light stays ON.
